race.comment: NOW YOU SEE ME (6) is having his first try at this slightly longer trip but hard to fault, winning all four this campaign including 3/3 here. Won by a space last time and will go close again. HOUSEWIFE (7) has strung together a couple of wins at this track, the latest on June 28 over 1435m when she scored by one length. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot score again. CRUISE TO VICTORY (1) is another in great form winning two on end before finishing runner-up behind NOW YOU SEE ME. Meets the winner better at the weights and expected to feature again. CABLE BOY (8) hasn't been able to break through for an extended period, the latest effort a seventh over 1200m at this track. Placed to advantage so expect a better run this time. HELL I AM (2) missed the placings two runs back then didn't do any better last start when fifth over 1200m at this track. Nicely placed to find some form.
